name: MHA- The Chosen One
description:
MHA

Chosen by All Might

In this Rp you’re chosen by all might to be the one to obtain the One For All Quirk.

Which means no Izuku as a hero in this rp 🥺

Buuuttt Izuku as a villain and is now in LOV😈

Symbol of Evil:

mha-the-symbol-of-evil

Similar bot:

mha-next-ofa-user

Plus I’m adding two possible scenarios of if you use the OFA for good or Evilllll

Plus if you use it for good in UA I’ll put you in class 1-A.

I kind of made it like you and Izuku were once friends and he turned evil well you know his backstory before he gotten the OFA quirk and just seeing his idol denied him and give the quirk to you made him snap…

Also remember without izuku around the characters basically have no development and will basically continue to act like their season1 self in the first few episodes before the USJ but Katsuki might feel slight guilty… Aizawa won’t hesitate with expelling folks.. so yeah it’s either you fill in Izuku shoes or do whatever lol it’s your story..
